classification.fail_closed_status: recognized WRF v4 option with CAM-family architecture proof
classification.recommended_owner: future CAM-family vertical-diffusion sprint, if CAM physics enters the production matrix

reason: CAM-UW is not an isolated standalone PBL column scheme in the v0.18 target matrix. The WRF source routes it through the CAM5 vertical-diffusion stack, requiring CAM cloud-number and sedimentation inputs, CAMMGMP/constituent coupling, and CAM residual-stress/cloud carry state. It is therefore fail-closed rather than accepted as an in-scope standalone PBL option.

evidence: CAMUWPBL imports CAM support and diffusion modules: module_cam_support, trb_mtn_stress, eddy_diff, wv_saturation, molec_diff, constituents, diffusion_solver, and optional modal_aero_data.
CAMUWPBL signature requires qnc_curr, qni_curr, wsedl3d, cldfra_old_mp, cldfra, rthratenlw, exner, and is_CAMMGMP_used in addition to ordinary PBL column state.
CAMUWPBL writes CAM carry/diagnostics: tauresx2d, tauresy2d, tpert2d, qpert2d, wpert2d, smaw3d, turbtype3d, tke_pbl, kvm3d, and kvh3d.
The source hard-fails when CAM pcols/NCOL is not exactly one, via wrf_error_fatal('Number of CAM Columns (NCOL) in CAMUWPBL scheme must be 1').
The CAMUWPBL call is guarded by presence checks for qv_curr, qc_curr, qi_curr, qnc_curr, qni_curr, rqvblten, rqcblten, rqiblten, and rqniblten.
The driver passes IS_CAMMGMP_USED and the CAM cloud-number/sedimentation fields into CAMUWPBL.
Missing CAM-UW optional arguments trigger wrf_error_fatal('Lack arguments to call CAMUWPBL pbl').
package cammgmpscheme mp_physics==11 carries CAM cloud/aerosol state including cldfra_old_mp, cldfra_mp, turbtype3d, smaw3d, wsedl3d, and tke_pbl.

v018_policy_mapping.why_not_reference_only: A standalone PBL9 module oracle would not represent the production target without also owning the CAM cloud microphysics/constituent/diffusion stack.
v018_policy_mapping.why_not_operational: The v0.18 operational PBL matrix does not include CAM microphysics/radiation/constituent state required by CAM-UW; running it would be a wrong-path substitution.
